title: begonia scandens
intro: Begonia scandens, also known as the creeping begonia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Begoniaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Begonia scandens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin irritations, and treat wounds. Begonia scandens can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
